criteria.description: The share surface stays text-only, removes fallback implementation copy from the user-facing card, and keeps desktop platform entry limited to X.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies the text-only share surface, the absence of fallback helper copy on desktop, and the desktop X-only platform row.

criteria.description: Mobile share handoff copies a single challenge payload before the app-wakeup dialog, and completed Journey tasks can be inspected locally without replaying the run.
criteria.notes: The regression suite now covers single-link mobile copy payloads, the handoff dialog, and completed-task expansion that preserves the current Journey focus.

criteria.description: Unit and integration validation remain green, and the Vite production bundle builds successfully after the 005 polish set.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: The final regression run passed 28 tests across 4 files, and the production build completed successfully.

criteria.description: All four work packages completed implement and review, and each reached approved status in the Spec Kitty workflow before acceptance.
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP04 are all in the approved lane and the mission summary reports approved=4 with no planned, in-progress, or for-review work left.
